name: io.github.semihbugrasezer/seerxo
title: Seerxo
description: Generate SEO-optimized Etsy listings — title, description, and 13 tags — from your AI assistant.

environmentVariables.name: SEERXO_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Seerxo account email; omit when credentials were saved with 'seerxo login'.

environmentVariables.name: SEERXO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional API key from seerxo.com — omit to use the free tier set up via 'seerxo configure'.
